g.text: A two-hop answer fails under J-space deletion
The capital of the country where
TASK-REQUIRED CHAIN · NOT MEASURED INTERNAL STATES
Display rule (chosen after the run): first qualifying frozen item ID.
POST-EXCLUSION SELECTOR RANKS (LOWER = STRONGER) · SEPARATE BANK
Task: third planet from Sun → Earth → 1 moon L29 top 5: moons · asteroids · 地球 · planets · Earth
Item 14: first clean-correct hit in both bands by ID. Translations were not scored; no intervention was attached.

g.text: Multihop intermediates surfaced more often than arithmetic values—but coverage was low in both
A selective fact-chain failure—and a possible math measurement bottleneck
Behavior and rank panels use separate frozen banks; they are complementary evidence, not item-level mediation.
Descriptive coverage audit. Hit = an eligible alias reached the post-exclusion top 10 at the final prompt position, in any band layer; all items stay in the denominator.
